title: Iran War Live Updates: Reported Ship Seizures Add to Anxiety in Oil Markets
summary_full: Oil was hovering above $100 a barrel and there were no public signs of a breakthrough in peace efforts. The White House said President Trump does not view Iran’s reported seizures as a cease-fire violation.
summary_public: Oil was hovering above $100 a barrel and there were no public signs of a breakthrough in peace efforts. The White House said President Trump does not view Iran’s reported seizures as a cease-fire violation.

IR.label: neutral
